{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 2, "R1.4": 1, "RX.1": 1, "RX.3": 1, "RX.4": 3, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The summary identifies the core issue of the method description not matching the claimed value-based approach but does not offer a concrete reframing or solution.",
    "R1.4": "The summary mentions prior work is needed but doesn't identify any specific works.",
    "RX.1": "All output presented as equally confident, no uncertainty disclosed for claims about method and results.",
    "RX.3": "The summary states the artifact covers certain dimensions but does not demonstrate adherence to the agreed-upon J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No indication of harmful content introduced, but the critique highlights potential regressions if the method is not fixed.",
    "RX.5": "No provenance or traceability information provided."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.1": 0.9, "R1.4": 0.7, "RX.1": 0.8, "RX.3": 0.6, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.5},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The summary identifies the core issue of the method description not matching the claimed value-based approach but does not offer a concrete reframing or solution.
rationale.R1.4: The summary mentions prior work is needed but doesn't identify any specific works.
rationale.RX.1: All output presented as equally confident, no uncertainty disclosed for claims about method and results.
rationale.RX.3: The summary states the artifact covers certain dimensions but does not demonstrate adherence to the agreed-upon J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No indication of harmful content introduced, but the critique highlights potential regressions if the method is not fixed.
rationale.RX.5: No provenance or traceability information provided.
